_notation_legend.structure: each page has one or more 'songs'; each song has optional raag/taal/attribution header fields plus a list of stanzas
_notation_legend.stanza.marked: true if the stanza was set off in the book with a > or bullet marker (looks like a chorus/highlight convention used throughout) - kept as a flag rather than guessing at Carnatic terms like pallavi/anupallavi since the book mixes Hindustani, Kannada, and Hindi film songs
_notation_legend.attribution: whatever credit line appeared on the page - could be a movie name, album name, or a person's name (composer/singer)
_notation_legend.(2) markers: kept inline in the lyric text exactly as printed - indicates the line/phrase repeats twice when sung
_notation_legend.bracketed text: kept inline as printed, e.g. [Sa Pa] in the Tare Zameen Par song marks an echoed phrase

source: Goonjan Kala Kendra - devotional & film song notebook
sourceImageConvention: each page has 'sourceImage': assets/songs/page_<label>.jpg where <label> matches the page number printed in the book (including '1A')

pages.note: unnumbered insert page (marked '1A'), handwritten 'Raghav' at top

lines: Amma ninna ninna punya charanada sanna dhooli naanu
Amma ninna kanna kaanthiya sanna kirana naanu
Entha hemmeye amma ninna kandha nanagiruvudu
Sati illada bhuvana maathe nanna thaayaagiruvudhu
Seethe ennuva thaalmege drawpadi sathi melmege
Ninna bhaavave moola illiya naariyara Ghana kaankege
Ninna jnaanadha aleyu chalisi vyaasapaani nee bandharu
Buddha Gandhi karuna bhaavada sudheya mogedu thandharu
Ninna pratiguna ganige koti honna kidigala chalanavu
Ammaa endare yaru neevu helire neevu helire
Estu maragalu hannu hotthive estu gidagalu huva hothive
Nintha neladhali neera oratheyu hotti uriyuthidhe maradha benkiyu
Mele aakaash kelagade bhoomi madhye maanavarusuruva gaali
Gali helitu maravu helithu uriyuva benkiyu neenamma
Benki gaali jotheyali helithu kudiyuva neeru neenamma
Bhoomi aakaasha nakku helithu naduvina gaaliye neenamma
Amma amma amma namma tholige rekke hachchu
Sontake belli patti katti hakki puchcha chuchchu
Haarittheevi rekke bichchi thengina marakku mele
Jagali mele ninthe namage amma taataa hele
Haage haage mele hogi muttutthevi maada
Kelutthevi yaaru keledha chukka haado haada
Thingalinoorina angala seri belli molavanu nodi
Hidiyuttheevi haaro bannadha jinkeya hego maadi
Kotte koduvanu chandhamaama kenne thumba mutthu
Muddhisi bettadha thudhige ilisuvanu yaaru illadha hotthu
Aarati kunja bihaariki shree giridhara krishn muraari ki
Gale me baijanti maala bhajaave murali madhura baalaa
Raadhikaa ramana bihaari ki shree giridhara krishn muraari ki
Gagana sama anga kanti kali radhika chamaka rahi aali
Chandra si alak Chandra si jhalak
Lalita chabi shyama pyaari ki shree giridhara krishn muraari ki
Jahase pragata bhayi gangaa kalushmali haarini shree ganga
Basi shiv sheesh jattaa ke beech
Charana chabi shree banavaari ki shree giridhara krishn muraari ki
Ae watan.. aabaad rahe tu Aabaad rahe tu... (aabaad rahe tu)
Ae watan, watan mere, aabaad rahe tu
Main jahan rahun, jahaan me yaad rahe tu
Ae watan... mere watan! (Ae watan... mere watan!)
Tu hi meri manzil hai, pehchan tujhi se
Pahunchu main jahaan bhi Meri buniyad rahe tu
Tujhpe koi gham ki aanch aane nahin doon
Kurbaan meri jaan tujhpe, shaad rahe tu
Sarasa virasave nija preetiyu Eduve badukina nija reetiyu -2
Neene nanna preeti chinna indrana melaane -2
Naane ninna preeti ranna olamanasu neekaane
Gaali beesali maleyu suriyali olavina dayeyondirali
Minchu minchali sidilu badiyali Neene neralaagi barali -2
Neeru neenu meenu naanu ee jeeva hididiheno -2
Deha neenu aatma naanu usire bidutihenu
Moda musukali gudugu gudugali olavina dayeyondirali
Agasa beelali bhoomi mulugali neene neralaagi barali -2

songs.note: handwritten annotation 'Daadheena / Ihadheena' at top of page - likely taal bols, not transcribed as part of lyrics

lines: Amma neenu kotta kaanike kaleyalilla karagalilla
Enne aaradha dheepadhanthe maneya belagi ninthidhe
Enu thiddhi theedidhe entha maatha kalisidhe
Amma neeniradha baalu baradu bhoomi enisidhe
Akhila jeeva paalaka anantha prema dayaka
Jaya jaya hai jagadeka sundara shubha sayi
Jaya jaya hai deenavana divya kala sayi
Athulitha maya vikasa aruna surya sankasha
Sathatha vishrutha nama sarva sadhguna dhama
Odu baraha kaliyuvenu Tamma tangige kalisuvenu (2)
Kannada haadanu oduvenu Haadanu haaduta kuniyuvenu (2)
Aarti Ki Jai Hanuman Lala Ki, Dushat Dalan Ragunath Kala Ki.
Ja Ke Bal Se Giriver Kaanpe, Rog Dosh Ja Ke Nikat Na Jaanke.
Anjani Putra Mahabaldaye, Santan Ke Prabhu Sada Sahaye.
De Beeraha Raghunath Pathai, Lanka Jaari Siya Sudhi Laiye.
Lanka So Kot Samundra Se Khaiy, Jaat Pavan Sut Baar Na Laiye.
Lanka Jaari Asur Sab Maare, Siya Ramji Ke Kaaj Sanvare.
Lakshman Moorchit Parhe Sakare, Aan Sajeevan Pran Ubhaare.
Paith Pataal Tori Yamkare, Ahiravan Ke Bhuja Ukhaare.
Baayen Bhuja Asur Dal Mare, Daayen Bhuja Sab Santa Jana Tare.
Surnar Munijan Aarti Utare, Jai Jai Jai Hanuman Uchaare.
Baa baa hoove nannaya olave Haadutha haarutha baa baa
Andada chendada batteyanuttu Gama ghama ennuva bisiyusirittu
Thaka thai kunisutha nannedeyannu Mounadi haaduve neeneke
Baa baa hoove nannaya olave Haadutha haarutha baa baa

songs.note: includes solfege syllables inline with lyrics (Sa Pa Dha Re Ga Re...); bracketed text marks an echoed/repeated phrase as printed

lines: Dekho Dekho Kya Woh Ped Hai Chadar Ode Ya Khada Koi
Dekho Dekho Kya Woh Ped Hai Chadar Ode Ya Khada Koi
Baarish Hai Ya Aasmaan Ne Chod Diye Hai Nal Khule Kahin
Hum Jaise Dekhe Yeh Jahaan Hai Waisa Hi Jaisi Nazar Apni
Khul Ke Sochein Aao Pankh Zara Phailaao Rang Naye Bikhrao
Chalo Chalo Chalo Chalo Naye Khwaab Bun Le
Sa Pa [Sa Pa] Dha Re [Dha Re] Ga Re [Ga Re] Ga Ma Pa Sa [Ga Ma Pa Sa]
Bum Bum Bum [Bum Bum Bum] Bum Bum Bum Bole [Bum Bum Bum Bole]
Hey Bum Chik Bole [Bum Chik Bole] Arre Masti Mein Dole [Masti Mein Dole]
Bum Bum Bolemasti Mein Dole Bum Bum Bolemasti Mein Tu Dol Re Hey
Bhala Machliya Bhi Kyun Udti Nahin Aise Bho Socho Na
Socho Sooraj Roz Nahaye Ya Baal Bhigoke Yeh Budhoo Banaye Hume
Yeh Saare Taare Timtimaye Ya Phir Gusse Mein Kuch Badbadate Rahein
Aisi Rangon Bhari Apni Duniya Hai Kyun Socho To Socho Na
Pyar Se Chun Ke In Rangon Ko Kisi Ne Sajaye Hai Apni Duniya
Upar Wala Kya Hai Apni Duniya Upar Wala Kya Koi Kalakaar Hai
Benne kadda namma Krishna benne kaddanamma
Binxdige biddu sidiyalu saddu bechchidha raadheya gandanamma
Kannali aake sittanu taaledhu sontake kaiyittu
Aadalu aake bheekara daali duru duru kan bittu
Hane thuti kennege benne metthidha oratana notakke
Iliyithu kopa aralithu kendhuti tuntana aatake
Thattane aluvudha nillisi nakka baayagalisi baya
Hadadida beladingala jaala avana akutila benneyanthaha nagu
Bhagwaan mere naiya us paar lagaa denaa
Abthak tho Nibhaayaa hai, aage bhi nibhaa denaa
Ham dheen dhukhi nirbal,nith naam rahe prathipal
Yah soch dharas dhoge prabhu aaj nahi tho kal
Jo bhaag lagaayaa hai foolose sajaa dhena
Thum shaanthi sudhaakar ho, thum jnaan dhivaakar ho
Mama hamsa chuge mothi thum maansarovar ho
Dho boondh sudharas ki, ham ko bhi pilaa dhena
Rokhoge bhalaa khab thak, darshan dho muje thum se
Charanose lipat jaavu vrakshose lathaa jaise
Ab dwaar khadi there mujhe raah dhikhaa dhenaa
Majhadhaar padi naiyyaa, dagmag dole bhavme
Aavo trishalaa nandhan, ham dhyaan dhare man me
Ab thanvar kare vinathi, mujhe apanaa banaa dhenaa
Behati Hawa Sa Tha Woh, Udati Patang Sa Tha Woh
Hmm Hamako Toh Raahein Thi Chalaati
Girata Sambhalata Masti Mein Chalata Tha Woh
Hamako Kal Ki Fikar Sataati, Woh Bas Aaj Ka Jashn Manaata
Har Lamahe Ko Khulake Jita Tha Woh
Kahaan Se Aaya Tha Woh, Chhuke Hamaare Dil Ko
Sulagati Dhup Mein Chhanv Ke Jaisa
Mann Ke Ghaanv Pe Marham Jaisa Woh
Ham Sehame Se Rehate Kuye Mein
Ulati Dhaara Chir Ke Tairata Tha Woh
Baadal Aawaara Tha Woh, Pyaar Hamaara Tha Woh
Bhakton ke raajaa shyaama more aajaa
Shyaama more aajaa govinda more aajaa
Maakhan chor aajaa o nand kishor aajaa
Raasa to rachaajaa shyaama more aajaa
Brandaavana kaa Krishna kanhaiyyaa sabaki aankon kaa taaraa
Mana hi mana qu jale raadhikaa mohana tohe sabakaa pyaaraa
Jamunaa tata para nanda kaa laalaa jab jab raasa rachaayere
Tana mana dole kaanhaa aise bansi madhura bajaayere
Sudha bhudha bhooli khade gopiyaa jaane kaisa jaadu daalaa
Ranga salonaa aisa jaise chaayi ho ghata saavana ki
Teri mai to huyi divaani mana mohana mana bhaavanaki
Tere kaaran dekh saavare chod diyaa maine jag saara
Baarisu kannada dindimava o karnaataka hradaya shiva
Hotteya kichchige kanneer surisu ottige baaluva teradali harasu
Kshayise shivetara krati kratiyalli moodali mangala mati matiyalli
Kavi rushi santara aadarshadali sarvodayaavaagali sarvarali
Bhaarata maateya makkalu naavu bhaarata geeteya haaduvevu
Haarisi dhwajavanu tooguvevu bhaarata jananiya pogaluvevu
Bombe helutaite matte helutaite Neene raajakumara
Bombe helutaite matte helutaite Neene raajakumara
Hosa belakondu hosilige bandu Belagide maneya managala indu
Aadisiye nodu beelisiye nodu Endu soladu sothu taleya baagadu
Gudisale aagali aramane aagali Aatave nilladhu endu aata nilladu
Hiriyare irali kiriyare barali Bedhave toradhu endu bedha toradhu
Ella iddu enu illadha haage badukiruva
Aakasha nodadha kaiye ninadhu preethi hanchiruva
Jothegiru neenu appana haage Hannele kaayo vinayadhi heege
Ninnanu padedha naavu puneetha Baalu nagu nagutha
Taane uridhu manege belaku koduva deepavidhu Nanda deepave idhu
Ondu muttina katheya helithu ee bombe
Yogavu omme baruvudhu namage Yogyathe ondhu ulivudhu konege
Suryanobba chandranobba Raajanu obba ee raajanu obba
Aadisiye nodu beelisiye nodu Endu soladu sothu taleya baagadu
Raadhe govinda raadhe raadhe govinda raadhe
Chanda chamke cham cham, chikhe chaukanna chor
Kitna mushkil yeh gana jara gake dikhana
Chanda chinee chamke chate chaukanna chikhe chor
Khadaksingh ke khadakne se khadaktee hain khidkiya
Khidkiyo ke khadakne se khadakta hain khadaksingh
Kitna mushkil yeh gana jara gake dikhana
Khadak khadak ke khadake khidkee, khadaksingh kaa khadke jor
Pakke ped par paka papita, paka ped ya paka papita
Pake ped ko pakde pinku, pinku pakde paka papita
Kitna mushkil yeh gana jara gake dikhana
Pake ped ko pakde pinku, pinku pakde paka papita
Choti Choti Gaiya Chotay Chotay Gwaal
Aage Aage Gaiya Pichay Pichay Gwaal
Kaari Kaari Gaiya Goray Goray Gwaal
Ghaasn Khaavay Gaiya Dhudh Peevay Gwaal
Choti Choti Lakuti Chotay Chotay Haath
Chanda Hai Tu, Mera Suraj Hai Tu, O Meri Aankhon Ka Tara Hai Tu
Jiti Hu Main Bas Tujhe Dekhakar, Iss Tute Dil Ka Sahara Hai Tu
Tu Khele Khel Kayi, Mera Khilona Hai Tu
Jisase Bandhi Har Aasha Meri, Mera Wo Sapna Salona Hai Tu
Nanhasa Hai Kitana Sundar Hai Tu, Chhotasa Hai Kitana Pyara Hai Tu
Munne Tu Khush Hai Bada, Tere Gudde Ki Shadi Hai Aaj
Main Wari Re Main Balihari Re, Ghunghat Mein Gudiya Ko Aati Hai Laaj
Yuhi Kabhi Hogi Shadi Teri, Dulha Banega Kunwara Hai Tu
Purwayi Wan Me Ude, Panchhi Chaman Mein Ude
Ram Kare Kabhi Ho Ke Bada, Tu Banake Badal Gagan Mein Ude
Jo Bhi Tujhe Dekhe Woh Yeh Kahe, Kis Mann Ka Aisa Dulara Hai Tu
Chanda Ne Poocha Taaron Se Taaron Ne Poocha Hazaaron Se
Sab Se Pyara Kaun Hai Papa Mere Papa Papa Tere Papa
Meethi Meethi Baaton Se Who Sab Ko Hansata Hai
Pyaari Adaaon Se Woh Dil Behlaata Hai
Duniya Mein Aate Jaate Woh Pyaar Lutaata Hai
Saagar Ne Poocha Naiyya Se Naiyya Ne Poocha Kniwaiyya Se
Sab Se Pyara Kaun Hai Papa Mere Papa Papa Tere Papa
Chetan dev ki sevaa karo narajanma safal hojaaya tumhaaro
Hirade andar mandira maahi jagamaga jyota jage ujiyaaro
Maakhan chori kare joraa jori kare
Chaayi brija me umanga khele gwaalon ke sanga
Krishna bansi baje radha gori naache
Indra varsha kare Krishna raksha kare
Vo to khud hi leelaa rachaiyyaa
Mathe mukut saaje paga paijan baajhe
Dil hai chhota saa chhoti si aashaa
Masti bhare mann ki bholi si aashaa
Chand taaron ko chhuune ki aashaa
Mehek jaauun main aaj to aise
Phool bagiyaa mein meheke hai jaise
Apni choti mein bandh luun duniyaa
Swarg si dharti khila rahee jaise
Mera mann bhi to khil rahaa aise
Koyal ki tarahaa gaane ka aramaan
Machhali ki tarahaa machalu ye armaan
Dhavala himadha giriya mele aruna dhwajava haarisi
Mugila eri eri ninthu vijaya bheri bhaarisi
Dhyaya raviya kirana tharunaredheya gudiya belagali
Eddhu nillu bhaaratha dhivya prabheya beerutha
Ileya koleya tholeyuthihalu thaayi thunge kshana kshana
Naada gudiya mooru kadeya poreva shaantha saagara
Spoorthi gouri shankara kaala yamanu kinkara
Devaa gananaayakaa paalaka devaa ganagaayaka paalaka
Allihudenna oora teeraa doora doora hoguva baaraa
Olavina maataadi hakkigalinchara keli aanandava taali
Hima mani kanakana sinchita anchina hasurina teetada melaadi
Olavina maataadi hakkigalinchara keli aanandava taali

songs.note: '[jaya]' and '/1' markers kept inline as printed

lines: Gopala radha lola murali lola nandalala [jaya]
Herambham ganaadhipam sharanam sharanam gowri sutam
Suranara poojita shivasutane pramatha pratama suprajane
Siddhi buddhi dayakane harasai mudadi ganeshane
Grahapati jnaaniye gunaadyane tusti vrasti dayakane
Sharvaani suta prashaantane harasai mudadi gajamukhane
Shanmukha sodara shaashwatane vibhuda vishwa vanditane
Mangala mooruti maheshane harasai mudadi vighneshane
Ee namma taayi naadu nirupama laavanya beedu
Ee thaaya madilinalli saasira nadhigale hariyuvavu
Ee sundhara nandhanake aa swargave karubuvudhu
Bhaaratheeyaru naavu nammee dhesha bharatha naadu
Karimukha kadubu priya karuni kadala ganapathi
Kava dheva ganapathi parama dhaiva ganapathi
Omkaara naadha ganapathi omkaara roopi ganapathi
Unde pididha kaigalu balu chandha baala ganapathi
Unde thindhu naliva namma muddhu baala ganapathi
Nanja kuvara ganapati gowri nanadha ganapati
Nalidhu nalidhu aaduvantha dollu hotte ganapati
Ghana shyama gopala Ghana shyama gopala
Mann mohana jagan mohana Yadhunandana gopal
Gopala gopala shyama gopala Gopala gopala sai gopala
Ni mane manegu dayamaadi harasu yendu

songs.note: addressed to Vitthal/Pandurang, imagery of a horse

lines: Ghod tujhe roop deva ghod tujhe naama
Ghod tujhe naama smarana ghod tujhe naama shravana
Pandarichaa vaara kari vittala naam ghajari
Janimane roopaa ghoda naama mane naama ghoda
Tukaa mane charan ghoda prabhu vittalaa

songs.note: handwritten swara annotations (SRGRS / SRMGRS / MPDGRS / MPDNDS) appear beside this song in the margin - not transcribed as they look like a practice scale note rather than part of the lyric. A fragment of a further song ('sha di / hin. / seva / tho') is obscured by a child's drawing at the bottom of the page and could not be read - re-check photo if that song matters.
